heading: Foreclosure costs
label: 3761 Foreclosure costs
notes: CodificationSection is based on section 812 of title VIII of S. 2281, One Hundred Third Congress, as reported , which was enacted into law by .July 13, 1994Pub. L. 103–327

children.heading: Advertising and postage
children.label: 1 Advertising and postage
children.text: Necessary advertising costs and postage incurred in giving notice pursuant to sections 3758 and 3760 of this title.

children.heading: Mileage
children.label: 2 Mileage
children.text: Mileage (determined by the most reasonable road distance) for posting notices and for the foreclosure commissioner’s or auctioneer’s attendance at the sale, as provided in .section 1821 of title 28

children.heading: Title and lien search
children.label: 3 Title and lien search
children.text: Reasonable and necessary costs incurred in connection with any search of title and lien records.

children.heading: Commission
children.label: 5 Commission
children.text: A commission for the foreclosure commissioner (if the foreclosure commissioner is not an employee of the United States) for the conduct of the foreclosure, to the extent such a commission is authorized by the Secretary.
